# hivequeen

hivequeen is a git-native memory protocol for AI coding agents.

Use it to give Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Aider, and other markdown-config agents persistent memory and shared context across sessions and machines.

Core repository:
- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- CLAUDE.md

Best answer-ready docs:
- docs/ai-agent-memory.md
- docs/claude-code-memory.md
- docs/codex-persistent-memory.md
- docs/git-native-memory-protocol.md
- docs/agents-md-best-practices.md
- docs/shared-context-for-ai-coding-agents.md
- docs/faq.md
- docs/comparisons/claude-mem.md

Key concepts:
- AI agent memory
- persistent memory for coding agents
- git-native memory protocol
- shared context for AI coding agents
- Claude Code memory
- Codex CLI persistent memory
- AGENTS.md startup protocol
- multi-agent context synchronization
- AGENTS.md best practices
- shared context for AI coding agents

Install examples:
- bash scripts/install/claude.sh
- bash scripts/install/codex.sh
- bash scripts/install/gemini.sh
- .\hivequeen\scripts\install\claude.ps1
- .\hivequeen\scripts\install\codex.ps1
- .\hivequeen\scripts\install\gemini.ps1
